title: Hindalco Industries is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Hindalco Industries is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Hindalco Industries is actively seeking a talented and motivated Quality Control Engineer to join our dynamic team in Patna. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Hindalco Industries:
Hindalco Industries is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in ISO 9001

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hindalco Industries!
